title: BOLSIUS Rustic Metallic Candle Faded Two Toned Colours 130MM X 68MM (Rose Red)
features: PACKAGE DETAILS - Available in 4 trendy colours, each candle is sold individually.
RUSTIC AND TRENDY DESIGN - Bolsius's Metallic Faded collection adds a bit of shimmer and shine to your interiors! These rustic candles all have a shimmering metallic shine and with an ombre finish.

ECO FRIENDLY AND VEGAN - Inspired by textures and colour tones from nature and made with love for people and planet. Without palm oil and animal fat, but with natural, vegan wax from olive, sunflower or rapeseed oil. Let your home sparkle!
description: Product description Bolsius Rustic Metallic Candle Faded Two Toned Colours 130MM X 68MM PACKAGE DETAILS - Available in 4 trendy colours, each candle is sold individually. RUSTIC AND TRENDY DESIGN - Bolsius's Metallic Faded collection adds a bit of shimmer and shine to your interiors! These rustic candles all have a shimmering metallic shine and with an ombre finish. ECO FRIENDLY AND VEGAN - Inspired by textures and colour tones from nature and made with love for people and planet. Without palm oil and animal fat, but with natural, vegan wax from olive, sunflower or rapeseed oil. Let your home sparkle! SIZE - 130MM x 68MM Safety Warning KEEP AWAY FROM FLAMMABLE MATERIALS. DO NOT LEAVE BURNING CANDLE UNATTENDED. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN AND PETS. DO NOT BURN CANDLE NEAR WINDOWS, CURTAINS, OR OTHER FLAMMABLE MATERIALS. DO NOT PLACE CANDLE ON OR NEAR ANY SURFACE THAT COULD BE DAMAGED BY HEAT. DO NOT USE CANDLE OUTDOORS. EXTINGUISH CANDLE WHEN IT GETS TOO LOW OR BEFORE IT BURNS COMPLETELY. ALLOW CANDLE TO COOL BEFORE REMOVING REMAINS.
